dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6344 IH: Contracting Accountability and Transparency Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Torres of New York introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Financial Services

form.official-title: To require the Secretary of Housing and Urban Development to require public housing agencies to disclose contracts entered into, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Contracting Accountability and Transparency Act or the CAT Act.

The Secretary of Housing and Urban Development shall, not later than 1 year after the date of the enactment of this Act, require each public housing agencies to publicly disclose, on the website of the public housing agency, with respect to each contract entered into by such public housing agency the following information—

paragraph.text: all material information about the contract, including the goods and service provided;
the date of the solicitation of the contract;
the bids and quotes solicited; and
the official who solicited the contract.
